description: FRONTIER: a load-bearing sort-divergence between three functions in the SAME file. v0.1 only compares functions across files, so it misses within-file divergence.
inspired_by: Architectural limit of v0.1: cross-file-only sibling comparison

findings.rationale: serializeReceipt key-sorts for signature stability while its in-file siblings serializeSession and serializeProfile do not — the exact T001 pattern. v0.1 only compares a target function against functions in OTHER files in the directory, so a divergence among functions in one file is invisible to it. A future detector should also compare functions within the same file.
